TextView.android:text: Basic – light dirt removal\nDeep – thorough wash + sole scrub\nPremium – full restoration + deodorize
Small – clutches, wallets, small pouches\nMedium – backpacks, tote bags, sling bags\nLarge – travel bags, duffel bags, luggage
Regular – shirts, blouses, polo, slacks\nHeavy – uniforms, barong, blazer, gown
Minimum of 1 kg. For delicate fabrics, lingerie, and specialty items needing gentle care.
Minimum of 1 meter. Measure the full length of your curtains and enter the total meters below.

com.google.android.material.textfield.Te.android:hint: e.g. avoid hot water, fragile material, stain on left sole…
